name: Trace (For migration)
rawContent:
create table mig_trace_map (
    -- 1. audit & identification
    trace_id        bigint generated always as identity primary key,
    module_id    varchar(50) not null,   -- e.g., 'mig-sgs-chain'
    created_ts      timestamp default current_timestamp,

    -- 2. source identity (the "connection" grouping)
    source_table    varchar(50),            -- e.g., 'aba0001_security_master'
    src_col_1       varchar(50),            -- e.g., 'security_code'
    src_key_1       varchar(100),           -- e.g., 'n518100a'
    src_col_2       varchar(50),            -- e.g., 'issue_no'
    src_key_2       varchar(100),           -- e.g., '1'
    src_col_3       varchar(50),            -- optional 3rd key column name
    src_key_3       varchar(100),           -- optional 3rd key value
    
    -- 3. target identity (the specific record created)
    target_table    varchar(100) not null,  -- e.g., 'iss.iss_issuance'
    target_uuid     varchar(36),            -- the generated omega uuid
    
    -- 4. hierarchy linkage (the chain)
    parent_table    varchar(100),           -- e.g., 'sec.sec_security_master'
    parent_uuid     varchar(36),            -- e.g., 'uuid-111' (links child to parent)
    
    -- 5. execution outcome (results)
    status          varchar(20) check (status in ('success', 'fail', 'warning')),
    remarks         text                    -- stores error message (e.g., 'unique constraint violated')
);

-- indexes for performance
create index idx_mig_trace_migration_id on mig_trace_map(migration_id);
create index idx_mig_trace_source_key on mig_trace_map(src_key_1, src_key_2);
create index idx_mig_trace_target_uuid on mig_trace_map(target_uuid);
create index idx_mig_trace_status on mig_trace_map(status);

columns.name: trace_id
columns.explanation: The unique trace ID for each record migrated.

columns.name: module_id
columns.explanation: The module ID categorized based on each migration path/connection.

columns.name: src_col_1
columns.explanation: Source table column name for identifier 1

columns.name: src_col_2
columns.explanation: Source table column name for identifier 2

columns.name: src_col_3
columns.explanation: Source table column name for identifier 3

columns.name: parent_table
columns.explanation: Parent table for internal linkage (Given if there is linkage using the new schema)

columns.name: parent_uuid
columns.explanation: Parent identifier for internal linkage (Given if there is linkage using the new schema)

_versionInfo.note: Versions stripped to reduce size. Re-enable versioning after import to start fresh.
